title: Geopolitical tensions reshape supply chains and the rare earth dispute intensifies
summary: Foxconn warns of geopolitical risks, Japan reassesses its dependence after the detention of a citizen in China, and Greenland attracts attention for its strategic mineral deposits.

title: Investors and analysts debate the possible AI stock bubble
summary: While some experts like Michael Burry bet against Nvidia and Tesla, others point out that the discount in these tech stocks represents a historic opportunity.

title: Oil attracts retail investors as conflict with Iran shifts focus to metals and electricity
summary: The opening of the oil market coincides with strategists' recommendations to invest in power and metals sectors amid the Iranian escalation.

title: Europe faces a key week with corporate earnings, new recommended stocks, and defense sector decline
summary: Quarterly reports are expected across Europe, while technical analysts point to five stocks to watch and the defense sector loses ground.

title: Dow Jones marks its best half-year since 2021 and investors await Fed minutes
summary: High stock prices become a status symbol, while Warren Buffett and other analysts offer perspectives on investment strategy.

title: US celebrates its 250th anniversary with Trump speech and military parade amid extreme heat
summary: President Trump delivers a speech about the 'golden age' while thunderstorms and high temperatures affect the official celebrations.

title: Germany and Japan implement measures to adapt to heat waves and torrential rains
summary: From careful installation of air conditioning in old buildings to urban green infrastructure, countries seek to mitigate the effects of extreme weather.

title: Dollar strengthens against euro and yen continues to weaken despite interventions
summary: Experts attribute the dollar's strength to the Fed's monetary policy, while the effectiveness of currency interventions in Japan is limited by the FX market.

title: SpaceX enters the Nasdaq-100 and interest in space stocks grows among investors
summary: SpaceX's inclusion in the index generates stock market expectations, while forums discuss the potential of AST SpaceMobile.

summary: The mobility company focuses on purchasing Delivery Hero, while the app developer turns struggling brands into a $23 billion business.

title: Morocco and France qualify for the quarterfinals of the World Cup
summary: Morocco scores three goals with only five shots, while France wins 1-0 to advance in the tournament.

summary: The young Italian driver claims the best time in qualifying at the Silverstone circuit.

title: Trump speaks with Putin and Zelensky ahead of NATO summit
summary: The former US president seeks to mediate the Russian-Ukrainian conflict through phone calls prior to the Alliance meeting.

title: Japan asks local governments to review vulnerabilities against AI cyberattacks
summary: The central government urges municipalities to strengthen their systems after detecting an increase in AI-based threats.

title: Netflix falls 21% year-to-date and analysts recommend buying amid historic opportunity
summary: The streaming platform shows its worst annual performance in years, but past data indicates it is a good entry point.

title: India regains investor interest as a haven from AI volatility
summary: Capital flows return to the Indian market due to the uncertainty generated by fluctuations in tech stocks linked to artificial intelligence.

title: South Korea's KOSPI valuation falls to lows since global financial crisis
summary: The price-to-earnings ratio of the benchmark index reaches historically low levels, attracting bargain-hunting investors.

title: Next prepares a takeover bid for Harvey Nichols stores
summary: The British retail group seeks to expand in the luxury segment with the acquisition of the iconic chain.

title: Rivian raises its 2026 forecasts as Tesla shares fall
summary: The electric vehicle manufacturer improves its long-term production outlook, contrasting with its competitor's troubles.

title: Russia: fear of assassination turns bodyguards into the new power brokers
summary: An analysis reveals how the paranoia of the Russian regime has elevated the power of security and personal protection services.
